name: Planet Fitness, Inc.
business: Planet Fitness, Inc. is one of the largest and fastest-growing franchisors and operators of fitness centers in the world by number of members and locations. The company sells fitness memberships to individuals through its corporate-owned clubs and franchises its brand to franchisees who operate additional clubs. It offers a high-quality fitness experience in a non-intimidating environment at low monthly dues starting at $15 per month.

exposures.sentence: The occurrence of cyber incidents, or a deficiency in cybersecurity, could negatively impact our business by causing a disruption to our operations, a compromise or corruption of confidential information, and/or damage to our employee and business relationships and reputation, all of which could subject us to loss and harm our brand and our business.
Planet Fitness adoption or non-adoption of artificial intelligence could result in an adverse impact on Planet Fitness financial performance or reputation or otherwise result in liability.

catalysts.event: Increase NAF contributions from 2% to 3% and decrease local marketing contributions from 7% to 6%
catalysts.sentence: For 2026, the franchisees voted to increase the contributions to our NAFs from 2% to 3% and decrease contributions to local marketing from 7% to 6%.

tamClaims.claim: Potential to grow club base to over 5,000 clubs in the U.S. alone
tamClaims.sentence: Based on our internal and third-party analyses, we believe we have the potential to grow our club base to over 5,000 clubs in the U.S. alone.
